narrative: ECB sources signal a near-certain June hike but caution on July, while US-Iran diplomatic optimism cools USD demand. EUR/USD holds 1.1624 as the Fed-ECB 175bp carry advantage persists; gold higher +0.06%; equities +1.08%; DXY +0.08%; VIX 17.4. GBP/AUD bilateral divergence dominates G8 flows (1.643% spread) as AUD slumps on weak flash PMI data. Watch Japan April CPI at 23:30 UTC for JPY directional cues.
